mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns show no statistical correlation with FEDFUNDS changes.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 5.0 percent, labor market slack signals weakening aggregate demand and reduced corporate earnings growth, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in greater than 55 percent of instances where UNRATE crosses the threshold, or the signal loses predictive power during recessionary periods.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales combined with stable consumer price inflation indicates robust consumer spending without triggering aggressive monetary tightening, producing positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict returns when CPIAUCSL growth exceeds 3.0 percent annually, or the interaction term coefficient becomes statistically insignificant in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production during a post-shock recovery phase reflects rapid capacity utilization and supply chain normalization, generating positive short-term S&P 500 momentum over the next week.
failure_condition: INDPRO acceleration fails to predict 5-day returns during supply-constrained regimes, or the signal reverses direction when capacity utilization exceeds 85 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real GDP directly correlates with corporate revenue expansion and profit margins, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth shows zero predictive power for quarterly equity returns over a 10-year sample, or Rank IC remains below 0.01 across all rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index crosses above 240.0, elevated inflation expectations force central banks to maintain restrictive policy, compressing equity valuations and generating negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive when CPIAUCSL exceeds the threshold, or the threshold effect disappears after adjusting for core inflation measures in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirms a strengthening labor market that supports consumer spending and corporate earnings, yielding positive monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal loses predictive accuracy when wage growth decouples from employment trends, or the interaction term shows negative out-of-sample IC.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in housing starts during a late-cycle expansion signals weakening residential investment and broader credit contraction, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Housing starts decline fails to predict negative equity returns when commercial real estate demand remains strong, or the signal shows no statistical edge over a 3-year rolling window.
